message:
fix(vdbe): route scalar max/min (2+ args) through PureFunc instead of aggregate path

In VDBE codegen, max(a,b) and min(a,b) with 2+ arguments are scalar
functions (NULL-propagating), not aggregates (NULL-skipping). Updated
emit_upsert_expr, emit_expr, and is_aggregate_expr to detect multi-arg
max/min and dispatch them correctly through the scalar function registry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
